timeline.summary: The jungle advance was halted at the river line.
timeline.aftermath: Protectors held the planet but suffered heavy attrition. The Ork warband withdrew to regroup.

timeline.summary: A joint Protector muster on Vortannis Prime prepared reinforcements for the front.
timeline.notes: Logistics columns are being rerouted through the northern warp lane.

timeline.summary: Orks and Chaos forces clash on a contested spacelane, slowing reinforcements.
timeline.mechanics: Both sides lost transport support and were forced to disengage.
unitChanges: Ork mobs reduced by one unit
